Thank you for contributing a new sticker to the BiocStickers repository!

Before submitting your pull request, please make sure you have completed the
following steps:

- [ ] I have read the
  [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/blob/devel/CONTRIBUTING.md)
  file.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` file in the main repository folder to
  include the new sticker.
- [ ] I have created a `README.md` file in the new sticker's folder.
- [ ] The `README.md` file in the new sticker's folder includes the following
  metadata:
    - [ ] Sticker / Package / Event name
    - [ ] Designer name and maintainer name (if different)
    - [ ] License information (otherwise, CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain
      License applies by default)
    - [ ] Preview image of the sticker (with ~200px height)
    - [ ] Brief description of the sticker (optional)

## Checklist

- [ ] The sticker is directly related to a Bioconductor package or project
- [ ] The sticker is in PNG, PDF, or SVG format
- [ ] The PNG sticker height is 2 inches (5 cm) and resolution is at least 300
  dpi
- [ ] The sticker is in a new folder with the same name as the sticker
- [ ] The sticker has a transparent background
- [ ] The sticker is licensed with a CC-BY-type license (otherwise, CC0 1.0
  Universal Public Domain License applies by default)
